_note: pipeline-machine.json owns transition truth. Set risk_tier from reversibility, blast radius, uncertainty, boundary count, and cost of error. Every skipped gate needs a reason and human approval. Artifact hashes and semantic verdicts are checked before each transition; invalidated artifacts fail closed. Append harness telemetry with scripts/pipeline-event.py.
_grace_full_note: GRACE Full is on for T3/T4. A T0-T2 route or explicit skip still needs policy.skipped_gates evidence when a normally applicable phase is omitted.
